title: The Road to Elbaf Opens
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, World Government, Unknown person #9, Vegapunk, York as Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.
scene: Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Six days before the present

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The kingdom of LuLucia has been erased...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The details are still a bit foggy,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I have a bad feeling about this.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: pythagoras, observe any changes to the sea levels and monitor all wireless transmissions!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you think this has something to do with the theft of the mother flame?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure of it!! That portion of the flame must've been delivered to the government by one of the weaponized sea beasts.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you'll permit me to indulge in pure conjecture, it seems plausible that the world government possesses one of the ancient weapons,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And they must have needed the mother flame energy that york stole to fuel it!! We'll see if the evidence supports my conclusion...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if this deduction is sound... it's hard to speak it aloud.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's my fault after all!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Only a fool lets their greed run amok, and I went and personified mine...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is there any benefit to approaching york now that we know?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, it's too late for that!! York's motives are irrelevant now, they will still...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Come to erase anyone who knows of the Void century!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: York already demonstrated her worth to them by Rashly handing over the mother flame.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The best we can do is use that trust as an opportunity to determine their intent for the flame and try to mitigate the damage.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stella, we still have a chance to escape if we flee now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Prepare a boat for the other residents- QuaSAR.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They still have a shot of escaping egghead,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But it'll be impossible for us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Navy will have issued secret orders to every branch and base by now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They'll chase us to the ends of the world,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And our inevitable deaths will be meaningless!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At least here on Egghead, we have something ohara didn't 22 years ago!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have the means and equipment toAmplify our voices as far and wide as possible!!

dialogue.speaker: World Government
dialogue.text: What exactly is the world government?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The closer I get, the more shrouded it becomes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: If I must die...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I will sell my life dearly!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I apologize for wrapping you two into all this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Don't be silly.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We're vegapunks, just like you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We're all thinking the same thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Just one issue, Stella...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What exactly constitutes death for someone like us?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Good point...

summary: This part advances the Egghead Aftermath through 38 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
